title: Cheeze Wiz Mods
description:
This is the modpack for Cheeze Wiz Kids:
Server IP: mc.rohanverse.com:25588
body:
# Cheeze Wiz Kids
**This modpack is for the server at IP: mc.rohanverse.com:25588 **CURRENTLY DOWN!****
Ever wonder what it was like to live in a post-nuclear world? Well, this modpack and server will meet your desires. Equipped with the most radioactive mod, HBM Nuclear Technology - Extended Edition for version 1.12.2. 

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ad3e3f1e931903b81c295a0be4b4482ae8793231.png)

## Build
## Explore
## Destroy

The goal of the game is to get a nuclear missile and launch it. ~~Once you do, the server should shut down and then I will reload it.~~ (~~It shuts down due to lag, but I'm working on a new server solution~~. SERVER NOW CAN HANDLE NUKES! Also thinking about adding a progression guide, with FTB Quests)

## Current Server Notes

**Note! The server is currently offline. Please wait for maintenance. This may take a while. Apologies for any inconvenience.**

I have a server, but not a lot of server management, like quests, lore, shops etc. I'll be working on that.


I have added a small amount of quests, and will work a bit more on it later. Also I am building a place for the shop to be. 


I am also planning more mods for more exploration, plus ore regeneration (I already made a plugin for that! I'll be implementing it soon!). However adding more mods will take time and bug testing. Will use FTB Quests for progression.



Please send a GitHub issue if the server is down.

_Last updated 4/24/2025_
